typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured - pure Python project"

blockingIssues.description: Hash-gating test only checks `unenriched_after > 0`, which does not validate that only changed nodes are marked for re-enrichment.
DB path consistency test omits `index enrich`, leaving required command coverage incomplete.
Cross-language edge test asserts only `edges > 0`, which does not prove edges exist across language boundaries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update python-cli-worker procedure to require explicit manual CLI verification commands (or explicitly allow validated test-only completion) before marking `followedProcedure: true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-integration review observed mismatch between required manual verification step and transcript evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add portability guidance forbidding machine-specific absolute paths in tests (e.g., use env setup/helpers instead).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-integration review found hardcoded `/Users/kjackowski/.factory/bin` PATH in tests/test_integration.py.
